product_overview: A FastAPI backend that ingests creator content from raw text, Twitter (X) or YouTube transcripts and runs a CrewAI pipeline to generate downloadable skill packages and source metadata.
core_goals: Allow creators to generate AI agent skill packages from pasted content, Twitter accounts, or YouTube video transcripts.
Return generated skill files and source metadata, and provide export/download and copy capabilities.
Validate inputs, surface meaningful errors and warnings, and protect the filesystem from path traversal.
Support long-running CrewAI pipeline runs while surfacing partial failures (warnings) for upstream sources.

features.name: Health Check
features.description: Check that the service is alive and returning its name/status.
user_flows: GET /api/health -> Receive 200 with body {status: 'ok', service: 'Creator Skill Backend'}
GET /api/health -> Receive 500 Internal server error

features.name: Root Info
features.description: Get a short usage message pointing callers to the generate-skill endpoint.
user_flows: GET / -> Receive 200 with body {message: 'POST /api/generate-skill with creator content'}
GET / -> Receive 500 Internal server error

features.name: Generate Skill from Raw Content
features.description: Submit pasted creator content to generate a skill package via the CrewAI pipeline.
user_flows: POST /api/generate-skill with body {creator_content: 'A long pasted creator content >= 40 chars', content_kind: 'generic', include_openai_yaml: true, persist_to_disk: true, include_zip: true} -> Receive 200 with GenerateSkillResponse (skill files, metadata)
POST /api/generate-skill with body {creator_content: 'too short'} -> Receive 422 validation error (creator_content must be at least 40 chars)
POST /api/generate-skill with body {creator_content: 'valid content but pipeline fails'} -> Receive 500 Internal server error

features.name: Generate Skill from Twitter
features.description: Provide a Twitter/X username to fetch recent tweets (25, excluding retweets) then generate a skill package; response includes source metadata about the tweets.
user_flows: POST /api/generate-skill/twitter with body {twitter_username: 'exampleuser', desired_skill_name: 'SkillFromTweets', include_openai_yaml: true, persist_to_disk: true, include_zip: true} -> Receive 200 with GenerateSkillResponse and source_metadata {twitter_username, tweet_count, tweet_ids}
POST /api/generate-skill/twitter with body {twitter_username: '@exampleuser'} -> Server strips leading '@' and proceeds; Receive 200 with GenerateSkillResponse and source_metadata
POST /api/generate-skill/twitter with body {twitter_username: 'exampleuser'} -> Server missing X_BEARER_TOKEN -> Receive 400 with message 'X_BEARER_TOKEN not configured'
POST /api/generate-skill/twitter with body {twitter_username: 'nonexistentuser'} -> Upstream X API error (auth/user not found/rate limit) -> Receive 502 X API error
POST /api/generate-skill/twitter with body {twitter_username: 'user_with_no_tweets'} -> Receive 400 with message 'No tweets found for user'

features.name: Generate Skill from YouTube
features.description: Submit one or more YouTube URLs; transcripts are extracted and combined to generate a skill package. Returns source metadata and warnings for skipped videos.
user_flows: POST /api/generate-skill/youtube with body {youtube_urls: ['https://youtu.be/abcdef'], desired_skill_name: 'SkillFromYT', include_openai_yaml: true, persist_to_disk: true, include_zip: true} -> Receive 200 with GenerateSkillResponse, source_metadata (video_count, video_ids) and warnings for any videos without captions
POST /api/generate-skill/youtube with body {youtube_urls: ['https://youtu.be/invalid']} -> Receive 400 No transcripts fetched or invalid URLs
POST /api/generate-skill/youtube with body {youtube_urls: []} -> Receive 422 validation error (must provide at least 1 URL)

POST /api/generate-skill/youtube with body {youtube_urls: ['https://youtu.be/partial_success','https://youtu.be/fail_no_captions']} -> Receive 200 with GenerateSkillResponse, source_metadata and warnings listing failed video(s)

features.name: List Generated Skills
features.description: List all generated skill packages including file entries with relative paths and file contents.
user_flows: GET /api/skills -> Receive 200 with body {skills: [{name: string, has_skill_md: bool, has_zip: bool, files: [{relative_path: string, content: string}]}]}
GET /api/skills -> Receive 500 Internal server error

features.name: Export Skill Package
features.description: Download a whole skill package as a zip, download an individual file, or request raw file content for clipboard copy.
user_flows: GET /api/export/{skill_name}/zip -> Receive 200 ZIP file download
GET /api/export/{skill_name}/zip -> Receive 404 Zip not found
GET /api/export/{skill_name}/{file_path} -> Receive 200 File download
GET /api/export/{skill_name}/{file_path_with_..} -> Receive 400 Path traversal attempt (blocked)
GET /api/export/{skill_name}/{file_path} -> Receive 404 File not found
POST /api/export/copy with body {skill_name: 'skillA', file_path: 'skill/skill.md'} -> Receive 200 with body {content: string, file_path: string}
POST /api/export/copy with body {skill_name: 'skillA', file_path: '../secret'} -> Receive 400 Path traversal attempt (blocked)
POST /api/export/copy with body {skill_name: 'skillA', file_path: 'missing.md'} -> Receive 404 File not found

features.name: Security - Path Traversal Guard
features.description: Middleware that blocks any request path containing '..' to prevent filesystem traversal.
user_flows: GET /api/export/skillName/../secret -> Receive 400 Path traversal attempt blocked by middleware
GET /api/export/skillName/valid_file.txt -> Receive 200 File download

known_limitations.issue: CrewAI pipeline takes 60-180 seconds to complete, may cause client timeouts
known_limitations.impact: Long response times for skill generation endpoints

known_limitations.issue: X API requires valid bearer token configured server-side
known_limitations.impact: Twitter endpoint returns 400 if X_BEARER_TOKEN not set in .env

known_limitations.issue: YouTube transcripts depend on video having captions enabled
known_limitations.impact: Videos without captions are skipped with warnings
